title: GoblinPack
description:
Client only modpack made for goblins 👺

“Die Mods sind begrenzt!”
body:
# Client only modpack made for goblins 👺
## Modlist
 - 3D Skin Layers
 - Animatica
 - AntiGhost
 - Architectury API (Fabric/Forge)
 - bad packets
 - Balm
 - Beenfo
 - Better Beds
 - Better Third Person
 - BetterF3
 - Blur (Fabric)
 - Bookshelf
 - Custom Entity Models
 - Chat Heads
 - Chime
 - Chunks fade in
 - CIT Resewn
 - ClickThrough
 - Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge)
 - CompleteConfig
 - Cull Less Leaves
 - Do a Barrel Roll
 - Drip Sounds (Fabric)
 - Durability Viewer
 - Dynamic Sou         nd Filters
 - Dynamic Crosshair
 - EasierVillagerTrading
 - Eating Animation [Fabric]
 - Entity Texture Features
 - Fabric API
 - Fabric Language Kotlin
 - Fabrishot
 - FastAnim
 - FerriteCore
 - Forge Config API Port
 - Indium
 - Interactic
 - Iris Shaders
 - LambdaBetterGrass
 - LambDynamicLights
 - LazyDFU
 - Light Overlay
 - Litematica
 - Lithium
 - Loading Screen Tips
 - MaLiLib
 - MAmbience
 - Memory Leak Fix
 - MidnightLib
 - Mod Menu
 - MoreChatHistory
 - Mouse Wheelie
 - No Chat Reports
 - Not Enough Animations
 - Numeral Ping
 - Ok Zoomer
 - Presence Footsteps
 - Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL)
 - ReplayMod
 - Roughly Enough Items Fabric/Forge (REI)
 - Roughly Enough Professions (REP)
 - Roughly Enough Trades
 - Smooth Swapping
 - Sodium
 - Sound Physics Remastered
 - Starlight (Fabric)
 - Stendhal
 - Tweakeroo
 - Visuality
 - WTHIT
 - Xaero's Minimap (https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)
 - Xaero's World Map (https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
 - YetAnotherConfigLib
